title: Xi Jinping meets with State Duma Chairman Vyacheslav Volodin in Beijing
description: Chairing the Russian parliamentary delegation, Vyacheslav Volodin is on an official visit to China
snippet: BEIJING, August 26. /TASS/. Chinese President Xi Jinping met with the Chairman of the Russian State Duma Vyacheslav Volodin, who is on a working visit to Beijin...
